decisions.title: Autonomy Comes From Shared State Plus Local Policy
decisions.description: Workers do not need a central scheduler for every move. A shared board, an inbox, and small local rules are enough to let them claim work and keep moving.
decisions.alternatives: A master planner could assign every step centrally, but that erases the lesson that useful autonomy can emerge from a simple runtime.

zh.title: 自治来自共享状态加局部策略
zh.description: worker 不必每一步都由中央调度器指挥。共享任务板、收件箱和少量局部规则，就足以支持自主认领和推进工作。

ja.title: 自律は共有状態とローカル方針から生まれる
ja.description: 各手順を中央スケジューラに頼らなくても、共有ボード、受信箱、簡単なローカル規則で仕事を引き取り前進できます。

decisions.title: Idle Time Is Part Of The Runtime, Not Dead Space
decisions.description: The idle step models waiting, polling, and checking for new messages or claimable tasks. Autonomous agents need a defined behavior even when they are between active actions.
decisions.alternatives: Ignoring idle behavior makes the demo shorter, but it hides how long-lived workers stay responsive between assignments.

zh.title: idle 也是运行时的一部分，不是空白
zh.description: idle 步骤用来表达等待、轮询和检查新消息或可认领任务。长生命周期 worker 在动作之间也必须有明确定义的行为。

ja.title: idle は空白ではなくランタイムの一部
ja.description: idle は待機、ポーリング、新着メッセージ確認を表し、長寿命ワーカーが割り当ての合間にも応答性を保つ仕組みを示します。
